name: Array Technologies, Inc.
summary: Array Technologies, Inc. is a leading global provider of solar tracking technology and fixed-tilt systems for utility-scale and distributed generation customers. Its principal products include single-axis tracker systems (DuraTrack HZ v3, Array STI H250, OmniTrack, SkyLink), SmarTrack software for energy optimization and weather protection, foundation solutions, and racking systems. Through its January 2022 acquisition of STI and August 2025 acquisition of APA, Array expanded its product portfolio to serve the full lifecycle of solar PV projects worldwide.
